series_metadata.series_description: These computer generated ledgers show daily vehicle registration sales and are used to reconcile with daily sales collected from data terminals.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report released ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report released ; Microform: microfiche is generated from State of Ohio Computer Center. It is duplicated and verified - original is transferred ODPS Record Center off-site storage, and a copy retained in section. audited by Auditor of State and audit report released
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
